stemHtml: The crew of a large Commercial Air Transport twin-engined turbojet aeroplane are preparing to take-off on an icy runway. In case of an engine failure during the take-off run, when compared to a dry runway, the flight crew expects that controlling the aeroplane's yaw will be...

options.a: More or less difficult, depending on the thickness of ice on the runway.
options.b: Less difficult because of the increased displacement drag and impingement drag due to the ice.
options.c: More difficult due to low friction forces.
